messages.content: Encanto USA DVD Release date

As of my knowledge cutoff in early 2023, the Disney animated film "Encanto" was released on DVD and Blu-ray in the United States on February 8, 2022. However, physical media release dates can change over time or vary by retailer, so it's a good idea to check with your preferred retailer or online platforms for the most up-to-date information on the availability of the "Encanto" DVD.
Raya and the Last Dragon USA DVD Release date

As of my last update in early 2023, "Raya and the Last Dragon," another Disney animated film, was released on DVD and Blu-ray in the United States on May 18, 2021. Similar to "Encanto," you may want to check with retailers or online sources for the most current availability of the "Raya and the Last Dragon" DVD, as release dates for physical media can sometimes change or vary.
Strange World USA DVD Release date

As of my last update in early 2023, "Strange World" had not yet been released on DVD and Blu-ray. Since the release dates for home entertainment can vary and they typically come a few months after the theatrical release, you should check the latest information from Disney or major retailers for an official release date for the "Strange World" DVD and Blu-ray in the United States.

Please note that this information might be outdated if "Strange World" has since been announced for a DVD release after early 2023. A quick search online or a check with a retailer should provide the most current details.
Strange World USA Release date

As of my knowledge cutoff in early 2023, "Strange World" was released theatrically in the United States on November 23, 2022. For home entertainment release dates, including DVD and Blu-ray, it's best to check the latest from Disney or major retailers for the most up-to-date information, as these dates are typically announced after the theatrical run and can vary. Please search online or inquire with a retailer to find out if a home entertainment release date for "Strange World" has been confirmed if my information is outdated.
The Super Mario Bros Movie USA Release date

As of my last update in early 2023, "The Super Mario Bros. Movie" did not have an official release date. However, these details are subject to change, and it is possible that a release date might have been announced after my knowledge cutoff. For the most current release date information, you should check the latest announcements from the movie's production companies, Universal Pictures and Nintendo, or watch for updates from reliable entertainment news sources.
The Super Mario Bros Movie is a production of

"The Super Mario Bros. Movie" is a joint production by Illumination Entertainment and Nintendo. Illumination is known for animated films such as the "Despicable Me" series and "The Secret Life of Pets." The movie represents a partnership between the animation studio and the video game company to bring the iconic "Super Mario" franchise to the big screen.

Universal Pictures is set to handle the distribution of the film. Since "The Super Mario Bros. Movie" is a significant collaboration between leaders in both the animation and video game industries, it has garnered considerable attention and anticipation from fans around the world looking forward to seeing the adventures of Mario and his friends in a new animated format.
Hawaiian Vacation USA Released date

"Hawaiian Vacation" is a Pixar short film featuring the characters from the "Toy Story" series. It was released in the United States on June 24, 2011, as the opening short accompanying the theatrical release of the Disney-Pixar feature film "Cars 2." In "Hawaiian Vacation," the "Toy Story" characters throw a Hawaiian-themed party for Ken and Barbie after their travel plans go awry.

For home release, "Hawaiian Vacation" was also included as a bonus feature on various home video editions of "Cars 2," as well as the "Toy Story" short films collection called "Toy Story Toons." Please check your preferred media provider if you're looking for the short's availability.
Small Fry USA Released date

"Small Fry" is another short film in the "Toy Story Toons" series produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released theatrically in the United States on November 23, 2011, alongside the Disney feature film "The Muppets."

In "Small Fry," Buzz Lightyear is accidentally left behind at a fast-food restaurant and must find his way back home, while the other toys deal with a miniature version of Buzz that has come with them from the restaurant.

As with other Pixar shorts, "Small Fry" is also available on various home media formats and was included in the "Toy Story Toons" collection for those interested in home viewing.
Partysaurs Rex USA Released date

"Partysaurus Rex" is a Pixar short film that is part of the "Toy Story Toons" series. It was released in the United States on August 10, 2012, alongside the re-release of "Finding Nemo" in 3D.

In the short, Rex, the anxious Tyrannosaurus toy, becomes the life of the party with bath toys when he helps them turn a routine bubble bath into a more exciting affair.

For those looking to watch it at home, "Partysaurus Rex" has been made available on various home media platforms and is included in the "Toy Story Toons" collection, along with other shorts such as "Hawaiian Vacation" and "Small Fry".
Party Central USA Released date

"Party Central" is an animated short film from Pixar, featuring characters from the "Monsters University" movie. The short was originally planned to be attached to the theatrical release of "The Good Dinosaur," which was intended for release in 2014 but was delayed. Instead, "Party Central" was released in the United States on March 21, 2014, and played in front of "Muppets Most Wanted" during its theatrical run.

"Party Central" follows Mike and Sulley during their time at Monsters University when they help their fraternity, Oozma Kappa, throw a legendary party.
Tick Tock Tale USA Released date

"Tick Tock Tale" is an animated short film produced by Walt Disney Animation Studios. It was directed by Dean Wellins and initially premiered at the Annecy International Animated Film Festival in June 2010. However, the short film was not immediately released to the public with a wide release or attached to a major Disney theatrical release like some other Disney shorts.

"Tick Tock Tale" did not have a traditional theatrical release in the United States. Its public availability came as part of the home media release. The short film was included as one of the bonus features on the DVD and Blu-ray release of "Wreck-It Ralph" in the United States, which was made available on March 5, 2013. This release allowed a wider audience to view "Tick Tock Tale" alongside the main feature film.
